title: Salina
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Salina.jpg]] |name=Salina |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]][[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] and brown |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Bright Tree Village tribe|Ewok tribe]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Oh! Look, Salina, what an ''exotic'' looking flower!''"
"''I've never seen anything like it, princess!|Kneesaa and Salina|}} '''Salina''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who lived on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], she was talking with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] when the princess found an exotic [[Damsel flower|flower]], pointing it out to Salina. However, the [[Flower/Legends|flower]] caused Kintaka to shrink and fall through the cracks in the [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|village]] platform, with Salina and other village members watching. ==Biography== {{Quote|Where did it come from, Chief Chirpa?''"
"''I know not! But leave it to my daughter to find a bloom of such ''rare beauty!''|Salina and Chirpa|}} [[File:SalinaFlower.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Salina and Kintaka discover the flower.]] Salina was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] member of an [[Bright Tree Village tribe|Ewok tribe]] that lived in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] on the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],{{InsiderCite|23|Star Wars Publications Timeline|''Star Wars'' Publications Timeline}} dates the events of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which include the events of [[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' 11]], to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], which corresponds to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. she was talking with [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]] when Kintaka discovered a [[damsel flower]] that members of the [[Fleebog]] [[Species/Legends|species]] had left for the princess, hoping to lure her to their home so that she could help them defeat a beast known as the [[ra-lugg]]. Kintaka pointed out the exotic [[Flower/Legends|flower]] to Salina, who had never seen anything like it. The pair then went off to show the find to the rest of the village, with Salina asking [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Chirpa/Legends|Chirpa]], Kintaka's [[Parent/Legends|father]], of the flower's origin; the chief was unaware yet impressed with his daughter's finding it. However, when the [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]] [[Logray/Legends|Logray]] noticed the [[Plant/Legends|plant]], he instructed Kintaka to drop it immediately, but it was too late—Kintaka began shrinking until she was small enough to fall through the cracks in the village platform with Salina and several other Ewoks watching. ==Personality and traits== Salina had [[Color/Legends|blue]]-and-brown [[Hair/Legends|fur]] and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Equipment== Salina wore a yellow [[Clothing/Legends|hooded]] [[Cape/Legends|cape]] that had a miniature five-pointed star accessory affixed to the hood's brim. ==Behind the scenes== Salina appeared in the [[Ewoks (1985) 11|eleventh issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Ewoks (1985)|''Ewoks'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic series]], which was written by [[David Manak]], illustrated by [[Warren Kremer]], and published by [[Marvel Comics]] on [[September 30]], [[1986]].{{BookCite|title=[[Marvel Age]]|number=Vol. 1 No. 45|publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] Group|date=[[December]] [[1986]]|issn=8750-4367}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Salina}} *[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Bright Tree tribe]] [[Category:Ewoks]] [[Category:Females]]
